Redefining the Clinical Experience

At Beacon Bay Veterinary Clinic, we believe that world-class medicine should be delivered with profound empathy. Our facility is designed to reduce stress for both pets and their owners, providing a serene environment where every diagnostic and treatment is explained with absolute clarity.

We aren't just your local vet — we are partners in your pet's lifelong wellness journey, serving the broader East London community with specialized expertise in small animal and exotic medicine.

Learn more about us

Opening Hours

Weekdays07:30-18:00
Saturdays08:30-12:00 and 17:00-18:00
Sundays09:30-11:00 and 17:00-18:00

Saturday afternoon, Sunday and public holidays attract a surcharge.

News

Clinic updates & pet care tips

View all posts

2025-09-18

Why Annual Vaccinations Matter for Your Pet's Long-Term Health

Vaccinations are one of the most cost-effective ways to protect your pet against serious, preventable disease. Here's what every East London owner should know.

5 min read

2025-08-04

What to Expect During Your Pet's First Visit to Beacon Bay Vet

A first vet visit can feel daunting — for pets and owners alike. Here's exactly what to expect when you come through our doors for the first time.

4 min read

2025-07-12

Understanding After-Hours and Emergency Vet Care in East London

Knowing what to do in a veterinary emergency can save your pet's life. Here's how after-hours care works at Beacon Bay Vet and what to do if your pet needs urgent help.

5 min read

FAQs

Answers to common questions

Call our team if you need anything more specific.

We recommend calling ahead so we can prepare and minimise waiting times. Emergencies are always assessed immediately — please call us on +27 43 735 1592 so we can be ready when you arrive.

Ready to book? Call our team.

Phone bookings only — no online booking required. After-hours calls to the clinic number are routed to the East London on-call vet rota.
